name: Peanutbutter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine powdered sugar and peanut butter in a bowl until well blended.
2. Spread 3/4 of this mixture on the bottom of the baked pie shell.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cornstarch, sugar, and salt. Gradually add scalded milk and mix well.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat in a double boiler until it thickens. Add butter and vanilla, then pour into the baked pie shell.
5. You can make meringue with the leftover egg whites, but my family prefers whipped topping. Sprinkle the remaining peanut butter mixture over the topping.
